title: Xenial Flaky Ethiopian Lamb Paella
description: A savory and flaky Ethiopian dish featuring lamb, sugars, and ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients, cooked to perfection in a paella pan, ideal for a post-workout meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the lamb pieces and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the berbere spice, sugar, salt, and black pepper, and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the chicken broth, saffron threads, and paella rice, and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low, cover the pan, and simmer for 20 minutes, or until the rice is cooked and the liquid is absorbed.
Remove the pan from the heat and let it rest for 5 minutes before serving.
